notes: First dry run of 3 required before any real deletion. Buffer matching validated by public_id substring in asset.source URL, cross-checked against list_posts(status=sent, dueAt>=now-7d). Two assets (social_2026-06_farmdroid_spray, social_2026-06_valtra_cvt) had no Buffer post match at all in full post history (back to 2026-05-14) yet were flagged for deletion under the age>=48h fallback rule -- flagged for manual review, see run summary.

First live (non-dry-run) execution, per explicit user confirmation that dry-run 1 matching was valid. Re-fetched Cloudinary SOCIALS listing and Buffer sent-post matches fresh before deleting -- both identical to dry-run 1 snapshot, no drift. Deleted via authenticated Cloudinary Admin API bulk DELETE /resources/image/upload (Basic auth api_key:api_secret), not the public delivery API. Post-delete verification confirmed exactly the 6 hard-floor assets remain in SOCIALS/. socials-cleanup.md skill created to replace the ad-hoc dry-run instructions for future runs (dry-run gate removed).
